title: gap-register
description: All identified gaps with type, severity, research resolution status, and remediation guidance. Produced by gap-analyst. Consumed by qaqc-agent, output agents, scope-determinator.

gap_type.description: Gap type classification: absent-unresolvable=not in submission and cannot be sourced externally; absent-externally-resolvable=not in submission but partially addressable through external research; fragmentary=present but insufficient; unverified=present but not independently corroborated; misaligned=present but wrong for stage/assessor/ask; conflicted=submission and research conflict; flagged=assessor or QA/QC flagged issue.

track.description: Which scoring track this gap affects.

severity.description: Severity of this gap relative to the confirmed framework and assessor priorities.

description.description: Clear description of what is missing or misaligned and why it matters.

research_resolution_status.description: Status of external research resolution attempt for this gap.

resolution_attempt_summary.description: What external research found (or did not find) when attempting to resolve this gap.

assessor_action_required.description: Whether this gap requires explicit assessor judgment before proceeding.

remediation_guidance.description: What the submitter would need to provide to resolve this gap.

kept_with_flag.description: Whether this issue was kept as-is with a flag at assessor's instruction (QA/QC escalation outcome).

assessor_resolution_note.description: Assessor's documented resolution decision if they were escalated to.
